calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-163 V3 full-completion gate -- VTA/hippocampally-planned arm (rerun, supersedes 495)
items.note: Successor to V3-EXQ-495 which SIGTERMed on ree-cloud-1 after ~4h (undersized CX22 platform restart -- not a code path; no manifest). No design change vs 495 (experiment_type bump + supersedes manifest field only). machine_affinity any: cloud-1 is now the excluded hub and surviving workers carry Phase-3 SIGTERM protection (transient exit codes + HELD_BY_SELF). Smoke-passed against current substrate 2026-07-09 (base full dry-run 137s + letter past-init). Diagnosed via /diagnose-errors.

items.title: Functional rebinding-under-perturbation test (MECH-456): ground-truthed competing-config overtake tracking above shuffle + rebind-ON vs rebind-frozen graded behavioural consequence
items.note: FUNCTIONAL test gating MECH-456 promotion (candidate/substrate_conditional/v3_pending; entities.rebinding_under_perturbation). Converged learned cross_stream_binder (strength 0.5/temp 0.2/conv_frac 0.85, per 725a). DV1: binder argmax binding-affinity tracks the TRUE current world-config (agent-position G=2 lattice region, binder-independent ground truth) ABOVE a region-label shuffle control. DV2: rebind-ON (live anchor) vs rebind-frozen (episode-entry binding, never re-evaluated) graded NON-saturating re-acquisition-latency consequence -- NOT frac_state_div (725a saturation). PASS=DV1&DV2 on >=4/6 seeds + binder-converged/coverage/overtake readiness. Deliberately NOT passable by n_rebind>0 exercisability alone (MECH-269(b)/478 inert-reset lesson). DECOUPLED from coherence-specificity Q (settled NO-CLAIM by 725a). Mint SKIPPED (disqualifier: no separable OFF/baseline training computation -- the ON/FROZEN arms are two eval-time readouts over ONE shared P0-trained binder + P1 trajectory per seed; no per-arm training to cache). Smoke: dry-run PASS (no crash; shuffle baseline ~0.25=1/K confirmed; not-ready self-route on 3-ep binder). validate_experiments --strict OK; validate_queue OK.
